arts.ttl: Arsenal make Thomas Partey contract decision after Mikel Arteta admission
arts.sum: According to The Athletic, Arsenal have opened talks with Partey and his representatives over a new deal before the current terms expire at the end of the season. Partey's current deal with the Gunners is set to expire at the end of the season, with the Ghana international playing a key role in the club's success so far this term.

arts.ttl: Why Mikel Merino and Ben White are not in Arsenal squad for Crystal Palace amid PSG worry
arts.sum: Mikel Merino and Ben White have not been named in the Arsenal squad to take on Crystal Palace. The Gunners welcome Oliver Glasner's side to Emirates Stadium on Wednesday evening, with Mikel Arteta intent on building some momentum ahead of the vital Champions League semi-final first leg against PSG next Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners midfielder 'receives Flamengo propasal' amid Saudi Arabia links
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho reportedly receives a proposal to join Brazilian club Flamengo when his contract expires this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News: Thomas Partey open to Arsenal extension - David Ornstein
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey is open to a contract extension, according to David Ornstein. David Ornstein of The Athletic has revealed that the midfielder is open to a contract extension.

arts.ttl: Berta may hold key to Partey's Arsenal future
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey's future remains unclear but recently appointed sporting director Andrea Berta may have the key to unlocking the uncertainty surrounding the player's contractual impasse.

arts.ttl: UEFA could make THREE changes to Champions League format after Arsenal complaint
arts.sum: The Champions League's new 36-team format has been in place for the first time this season but some changes have been floated before the end of the current campaign

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal have held talks with reps of £50m star who's ‘one of the best’ players in the world in his position
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm what Milos Kerkez’s camp has now done amid interest from the likes of Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester City. Liverpool, Arsenal...

arts.ttl: Live Blog: Arsenal v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are in London derby action against Arsenal tonight (Wednesday, 23rd April, 20:00 BST kick-off) – follow LIVE updates from the Emirates Stadium below!

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea handed Xavi Simons transfer update as new RB Leipzig 'stance' emerges
arts.sum: The report claims that Simons is valued at around €80million (£68.5million) going into the summer transfer window, but the Bundesliga club are yet to receive any official offers for the playmaker. RB Leipzig have reportedly named their asking price for playmaker Xavi Simons this summer, amid reported interest from Arsenal and Chelsea .

arts.ttl: How Arsenal aim to learn US lessons for Emirates to aid Mikel Arteta and Andrea Berta plans
arts.sum: “While in North America it is obviously important to grow your brands and to grow your teams, certainly in the Premier League, the more revenue you can drive does affect the product that you can put on the pitch,” Demoff said. The company also has extensive real estate attached to their sporting assets such as the Gunners’ Emirates Stadium home, the So-Fi Stadium where the LA Rams play, and the Nuggets’ Ball Arena home.
